productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Pure Victory White Grey Black Shoe
description: The reebok Pure Victory II shoe offers excellent comfort and cushioning. The soft perforated leather upper offers plush comfort and support while keeping the feet cool. What's even better is reebok's Hexalite cushioning system in the heel that provides shock absorption for those harsh landings. This is that perfect shoe for the avid tennis player looking for superb comfort on and off the court. Upper Soft leather upper for comfort and durable Fit Durafit on medial forefoot upper and toe for durability in high-wear areas Several perforations to keep feet cool Padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfort Midsole Soft, cushioned insole for all-day comfort Midsole made of Hexalite for enhanced shock absorption in areas of peak pressure Outsole Trustic unit made of durable rubber extended to the sides through a transition bridge for complete inner arch support Non-marking outsole which will not leave marks on the floor Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
